subcodes.first_line: O thou who makest mention! Verily, He Who is mentioned remembereth thee and giveth thee glad tidings of the river of thy Lord's mercy, the All-Forgiving, the Most Bountiful. Make mention, then, of the Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الذاکر ان المذکور یذکرک و یبشرک بفرات رحمه ربک الغفور الکریم ان اذکر المظلوم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for spiritual recognition
